name: comfyq-desktop
description: ComfyQ Fleet Monitor — LAN status of every ComfyQ machine

scripts._comment_dist: Packaging installers is optional/deferred. It needs electron-builder, which is NOT a default dependency (its transitive tree is large + carries advisories we don't want in the run-time install). To build: `npm i -D electron-builder` here, then `npm run dist`.
